source_title: 02 Building Environments - The Basics/12 Rendering (Nuke and After Effects in ACES)

evidences.content: So now we're ready to launch our first render 现在我们准备好启动第一次渲染 And we have two different ways to approach rendering 我们有两种不同的渲染方式 So I'm going to stop here and press on our little clapper 所以我会在这里停下来，然后点击我们的小板手 board to launch Movie Render Queue 启动电影渲染队列的板手 And immediately 然后立即 it'll add our level sequence here 它将在这里添加我们的层序列 as a job in the Movie Render Queue 作为电影渲染队列中的一个任务 And our render settings are going 而我们的渲染设置将 to be made through Movie Render Queue configs 通过电影渲染队列配置来进行 So if I open that up 所以如果我打开它 that's exactly 那就是 what we're looking at here 我们在这里看到的 Most of the things you'll want to look at 大多数你想要查看的东西 are going to be in the Output tab at first 一开始都在输出选项卡中 you can change the output directory 你可以更改输出目录 where you want to render out your file 你想渲染文件的位置 as well as the resolution and the playback 以及分辨率和回放 range at the bottom here 在这里的底部范围 what I like to do in the output directory 我喜欢在输出目录中做的事 is go to the end 是到达末尾 And I'll throw in left bracket and just type 然后我会加上左括号，然后输入 in sequence name here 在这里输入序列名称 every time you render 每次渲染时 create a render inside of a folder that just matches 在一个与之匹配的文件夹中创建一个渲染 the name of your sequence 你的序列名称 And it makes it really easy to know exactly what you rendered 这使得你能够清楚地知道你渲染了什么 But we've actually created some Movie Render Queue configs 但我们实际上已经创建了一些电影渲染队列配置 So you don't have to worry about this for now 所以你现在不必担心这个 So there's two different ways to render 所以有两种不同的渲染方式 One is with the QuickTime 一种是使用QuickTime where we'll create a movie file 我们将在这里创建一个电影文件 And the other is with our PlayBlast 另一个是使用我们的PlayBlast where we'll create an image sequence 我们将在这里创建图像序列 But this requires some additional assembly 但这需要一些额外的组装 So you can press on this down arrow 所以你可以按这个向下的箭头 And you'll see we have all these different presets 你会看到我们有所有这些不同的预设 But the two that you'll need to know early on 但你早期需要了解的两个是 are just the PlayBlast preset and the PlayBlast QuickTime 只是PlayBlast预设和PlayBlast QuickTime So the easiest one to use is the PlayBlast QuickTime 所以最容易使用的是PlayBlast QuickTime you can launch a render just by pressing 你只需按下就可以启动渲染 Render Local 本地渲染 And this will launch a movie pipeline render 这将启动一个电影管道渲染 And it will start to render out your scene 然后它将开始渲染你的场景 And then looking at your project file 然后查看你的项目文件 directory of your UEVFX 101 starter pack 你的UEVFX 101入门包目录 just go into the Saved folder 只需进入Saved文件夹 we should have a Movie Renders folder 我们应该有一个Movie Renders文件夹 where we'll find Level Sequence TDK 我们会找到Level Sequence TDK So this will be rendered as a ProRes QuickTime 所以这将被渲染为ProRes QuickTime So the best way to view this is with the QuickTime player 所以最好的方式是使用QuickTime播放器查看这个 which is a free download 这是免费下载的 if you bring this into your editing software 如果你将这个带到你的编辑软件中 of choice 你选择的软件 it should look exactly like your viewport 它应该与你的视口完全一样 And one thing you'll notice in this clip 你会注意到这个片段中的一件事 is we get this bright white shape at the beginning 就是在开始时出现了这个明亮的白色形状 This can be from Lumen freaking out 这可能是由Lumen引起的恐慌 when the engine first starts up 当引擎首次启动时 So just know that you'll want to include about 50 frames 所以只需知道你会想要包含大约50帧 of pre-roll whenever you're rendering something 在你渲染东西时要包含一些预先的帧数 Just 50 frames before your sequence 就在你的序列开始之前的50帧 actually needs to start to resolve any errors like this 实际上需要开始解决类似的错误 And if you want to use this rendering preset 如果你想使用这个渲染预设 in your own projects 在你自己的项目中 just make sure 只需确保 to enable this Apple ProRes Media plugin in your project 在你的项目中启用这个Apple ProRes媒体插件 But a more common way to render 但更常见的渲染方式 is gonna be using this PlayBlast preset 将使用这个PlayBlast预设 And this will create a JPEG image sequence 这将创建一个JPEG图像序列 to render each frame 用于渲染每一帧 So let's talk about rendering 那么，让我们谈谈渲染 and how to create a photorealistic render 以及如何创建逼真的渲染 photorealism 逼真效果 if you split the word in half 如果把这个词分成两半 the first side is photo 第一部分是照片 which means we need 这意味着我们需要 to create photographic qualities in our images 在我们的图像中营造照片的质感 And the way we can do that is by imitating 我们可以通过模仿的方式来实现 some different features of a camera and a camera lens 相机和镜头的一些不同特性 So cameras in real life have film grain and noise 现实生活中的相机有胶片颗粒和噪音 on a film stock versus a digital camera 与数码相机相比的胶片底片 but every camera has a lens 但每台相机都有镜头 And that means there's depth of field 这意味着有景深 is coming from the camera lens 来自相机镜头 So the bokeh or depth of field 因此，浅景深或景深 that's from focusing the light inside of the camera lens 是通过聚焦相机镜头内的光线来实现的 It'll also come with lens distortion 还会伴随着镜头畸变 lens flares 镜头光晕 diffusion 扩散 which can happen from different coatings 可能是由于不同的涂层 on top of the lens 在镜头上方 as well as chromatic aberration and halation 以及色差和光晕 These are all the qualities photographs have 这些都是照片具有的特性 that we should add to our renders 我们应该在渲染中添加的特性 But the realism side comes from capturing 但现实感来自于捕捉 the qualities of real life 真实生活的特质 And this is what you're going to have to create 这就是你需要创造的东西 in your 3D scene inside of Unreal 在虚幻引擎中的你的3D场景里 So that means that the color and the brightness 这意味着颜色和亮度 of everything matches real life 一切都与现实生活相匹配 The scale of the geometry and the textures 几何体和纹理的比例 on that geometry also match one-to-one with real life 几何体上的纹理也与现实生活一一匹配 as well as the lighting 以及光照 and then the depth and atmosphere inside of your scene 然后是场景内的深度和氛围 So just remember that the photo side of photorealism 所以记住，照片般逼真的一面 is coming from the compositing 来自合成 and the realism is from Unreal 而真实感则来自虚幻引擎 So it's the 3D scene that we're creating 所以我们正在创造的是3D场景 So if you want your renders to look photoreal 所以如果你想让你的渲染看起来逼真 and treat it like a camera 并像对待相机一样对待它 then we should treat our renders like a raw photograph 那么我们应该像对待原始照片一样对待我们的渲染 So raw photographs are just a way of capturing an image 因此，原始照片只是捕捉图像的一种方式 where we can change the exposure up and down 在这里，我们可以调整曝光度 after the fact in our editing software 事后在我们的编辑软件中 And raw images have a ton of extra dynamic range and data 而且原始图像具有大量额外的动态范围和数据 So with a raw file or a raw photograph 因此，使用原始文件或原始照片 you can expose up and down 你可以调整曝光度 and it'll look identical to adjusting the exposure in camera 它看起来与在相机中调整曝光度完全相同 because raw is storing all of the available light data 因为原始文件存储了所有可用的光数据 They're really big files 它们是非常大的文件 And if we treat our renders like raw photographs 如果我们像对待原始照片一样对待我们的渲染 our work will look a lot more photorealistic 我们的作品将看起来更加逼真 But here's the big problem 但这里有个大问题 The internet runs on sRGB images 互联网使用sRGB图像 So whether you realize it or not 所以不管你是否意识到 every image and video you see on the internet 你在互联网上看到的每张图片和视频 from Facebook 从Facebook everywhere that you can see 无处不在 they're sRGB images 它们是sRGB图像 And sRGB is a color space 而sRGB是一种色彩空间 so here's the problem 所以问题在于 The internet runs on sRGB 互联网运行在sRGB上 So most image and video that you'll see on any website 所以你在任何网站上看到的大多数图像和视频 like Facebook 像Facebook they're all gonna be sRGB images 它们都将是sRGB图像 and typically JPEGs or PNGs 通常是JPEG或PNG格式 The standard for you to assume 你要假设的标准 is that they're all sRGB images 是它们都是sRGB图像 And these don't have nearly the same amount of information 而这些并没有几乎相同的信息量 that a raw file has 就像原始文件那样 They're only eight-bit images 它们只是8位图像 And all that this means is if you take two 这只是意味着如果你取两个 to the eighth power 到8次方 that means we have 256 values 这意味着我们有256个值 different colors that we can choose 我们可以选择的不同颜色 for each of our R 对于我们的每一个R通道 and B channels 和B通道 And you can see that here 你可以在这里看到 with our Photoshop color picker here 使用我们这里的Photoshop取色器 but sRGB has limitations 但sRGB有局限性 so you can't expose up and down 所以你不能上下曝光 like we could with a raw photograph 就像我们可以处理原始照片那样 When you expose down 当你下曝光时 all of your white values 所有白色值 immediately become gray 立即变为灰色 It's like these headlights 就像这些前灯 you'd expect them to be really 你期望它们真的 really bright 非常明亮 even if you just exposed down your camera 即使你只是下曝光你的相机 because we don't have any data brighter than white 因为我们没有比白色更亮的数据 but if we go into ACES 但如果我们进入ACES we can reduce the exposure 我们可以减少曝光 and have the same dynamic range 并且具有相同的动态范围 that a camera or a raw photograph would have 就像相机或原始照片一样 So what is ACES 那么，什么是ACES Don't worry 不要担心 we're gonna keep it very 我们将保持非常简单 very simple here 这里非常简单 All that we really need to know is that working in ACES 我们真正需要知道的是在ACES中工作 is like working with raw photographs 就像使用原始照片一样 So if we're able to change our compositing color space 因此，如果我们能够更改我们的合成颜色空间 to ACES instead of sRGB 而不是sRGB到ACES we'll be able to manipulate our renders 我们将能够操纵我们的渲染 just like a raw photograph 就像一张原始照片一样 So inside of Unreal 因此，在虚幻中 all that we have to do 我们要做的一切 is select the PlayBlast preset to launch our render 只需选择PlayBlast预设以启动我们的渲染 and this will create a JPEG sequence that is an sRGB image 这将创建一个JPEG序列，它是一个sRGB图像 But when we go to composite it 但当我们进行合成时 whether it's an After Effects 无论是After Effects or Fusion 或Fusion we're gonna convert this into ACES 我们将把这转换为ACES so that we can work with our image like a raw photograph 以便我们可以像处理原始照片一样处理我们的图像 But then when we go to export it or deliver this clip 但当我们要导出它时 whether it's into our editing software or directly online 无论是进入我们的编辑软件还是直接在线 we're gonna export our clip as an sRGB image 我们将导出我们的剪辑为sRGB图像 or MP4 format 或MP4格式 So screenshot this or just save it in your notes 所以截屏或只需保存在您的笔记中 but all we really have to know here 但我们在这里真正需要知道的是 is that we're gonna take an sRGB image 我们将采用一个sRGB图像 convert it into ACES so we'll work with it 将其转换为ACES，这样我们就可以处理它了 like a raw photograph 就像一张原始照片一样 and then we'll export it back into sRGB 然后我们将其导出回sRGB So let's run through this workflow 那么让我们来跟随这个工作流程 It's actually really simple 实际上非常简单 Just follow along step by step 只需一步步跟随 and this will never change again 而且这将永远不会改变 You just do this every single time with every project 你只需在每个项目中每次都这样做 and you'll be working 然后你就可以工作了 in the most color-accurate way possible 以尽可能准确的颜色方式 So back in my project 所以回到我的项目 I'm just gonna go back 我只是会回去 and select the 01 PlayBlast Movie Render QConfig 然后选择01 PlayBlast电影渲染QConfig and press Render Local 然后按“本地渲染” So now I'll go back to my Saved Movie Renders folder 那么现在我将回到我的已保存电影渲染文件夹 go into our sequence for LS 进入我们的LS序列 the Dark Knight 黑暗骑士 and now I can see I have my image sequence 现在我可以看到我的图像序列 and I even have a little version number here 而且我这里甚至有一个小版本号 So now let's assemble our image sequence 那么现在让我们组装我们的图像序列 the right way using ACES 使用ACES的正确方式 and we'll start off showing the Nuke workflow 然后我们将开始展示Nuke工作流程 but just hold on if you use After Effects 但如果你使用After Effects，请稍等 We'll show that right after 我们将随后展示 So I've just opened up NukeX Non-Commercial 所以我刚刚打开了NukeX非商业版 and we're starting from a fresh project here 我们从这里的一个新项目开始 and all we have to do whenever starting a project 每次开始一个项目时我们只需做这一步 is go to Edit 就是进入编辑 Project Settings 项目设置 and then go to the Color tab up here 然后转到这里的颜色选项卡 and under Color Management 在颜色管理下 we're gonna switch this over to OCIO 我们将切换到OCIO and change our OCIO config to ACES 并将我们的OCIO配置更改为ACES And now we've switched Nuke over into ACES 现在我们已经将Nuke切换到了ACES and now our viewport will work like raw photography 现在我们的视口将像原始摄影一样工作 using linear color 使用线性颜色 So let's bring in our image sequence 让我们导入我们的图像序列 by pressing the R key 通过按下R键 which will make a new read node inside of Nuke 这将在Nuke内创建一个新的读取节点 and I'm gonna navigate to my image sequence 然后我会导航到我的图像序列 And now all you have to do 现在你所要做的就是 when you bring in a new file is double-click on it 当你导入一个新文件时，双击它 then go to Input Transform 然后转到输入转换 and change this over to Output sRGB 并将此更改为输出sRGB to tell Nuke that this is starting as an sRGB image 告诉Nuke这是一个以sRGB图像开始的 now we've converted this sRGB output 现在我们已经将这个sRGB输出转换了 into the ACES working space 进入ACES工作空间 and now if we expose our image up or down 现在，如果我们曝光我们的图像上下 you can see that we have full dynamic range 你会看到我们有完整的动态范围 just like a photograph 就像一张照片一样 and when we expose up 当我们曝光时 it stays a lot more photographic 它保持更多的照片感 So instead of having our highlights clipped 所以，与其让我们的亮点被剪切 like you would normally have when you import this into Nuke 就像你通常在将其导入Nuke时会发生的 now we have full dynamic range by switching over to ACES 现在，通过切换到ACES，我们拥有完整的动态范围 where we can see the brights in our highlights 在那里，我们可以看到亮点中的亮光 and when we expose down 当我们曝光下去时 we can see the cyan color in Mannequin's chest piece here 我们可以在这里看到模特的胸甲中的青色 This may not have even been obvious 这可能甚至不明显 but you can see that the reflection 但你可以看到反射 has this nice cyan color 有这个漂亮的青色 but to the eye 但对于眼睛来说 it almost looks like 它几乎看起来像 there's barely any cyan color in there 几乎没有任何青色在那里 but we can see that all of the data is retained 但我们可以看到所有的数据都被保留 now that we're using ACES 现在我们正在使用ACES to render out this image sequence 渲染这个图像序列 all we have to do is add in this Unreal Bright node 我们只需添加这个虚幻亮度节点 Now I've included this with the compositing template 现在我已经将其包含在合成模板中 and this is just a one-click render node setup 这只是一个一键渲染节点设置 Now all you have to do is plug this directly 现在你只需将这个直接插入 into the read node of your render 插入到渲染的读取节点 press Setup 按下设置 and it'll automatically update the frame range 它会自动更新帧范围 and the file path based on the name of your file 根据你的文件名更新文件路径 And this will add in film grain 这将添加胶片颗粒 chromatic aberration 色差 vignetting 暗角效果 and halation with these really easy-to-use 使用这些非常简单的方式添加辉光和晕影 sliders so you can drag them up and down 滑块，所以你可以上下拖动 as well as some simple color controls 还有一些简单的颜色控制 And then all you have to do is press the Render button 然后你只需按下渲染按钮 and render out your sequence 渲染你的序列 and this will render it out as a QuickTime file 这将渲染为QuickTime文件 Now if you wanted to render this out using a Write node 如果你想使用Write节点渲染这个 which is the normal way that you render out of Nuke 这是你从Nuke渲染的正常方式 all you have to do is change this to a mov 你只需将这个更改为mov and change your output transform to Output sRGB 并将输出变换更改为输出sRGB all that we're doing here is telling Nuke 我们在这里所做的就是告诉Nuke to render this out as sRGB so we can deliver it 以sRGB格式渲染，以便我们可以交付 to the web and into other softwares 到网络和其他软件 Now if you wanna do the same thing in After Effects 如果你想在After Effects中做同样的事情 it's really straightforward and it'll just take 这非常简单，只需要 a minute or two to set up 一两分钟设置 Just make sure that you've downloaded the latest version 确保你已经下载了最新版本 of Adobe After Effects Adobe After Effects的最新版本 This is a brand new feature in the latest version 这是最新版本的全新功能 of After Effects 2023 that'll allow us After Effects 2023中的新功能，将使我们能够 to composite shots using ACES 使用ACES合成镜头 So here I am in a brand new After Effects project 所以我在一个全新的After Effects项目中 All we have to do here is go into your project panel here 我们在这里需要做的就是进入项目面板 and at the bottom you should see this little 8BPC 在底部，你应该看到这个小小的8BPC It stands for Bits Per Channel 这代表每通道的位数 This will actually just pop up and show us 这实际上会弹出并显示给我们 our color project settings here 这里是我们的色彩项目设置 What we wanna do is go into the Color Management tab 我们要做的是进入“颜色管理”选项卡 and go from Adobe over to OCIO and press OK 从Adobe切换到OCIO，然后按确定 and then make sure we have the ACES 12 然后确保我们选择了ACES 12 configuration selected 已选择的配置 we wanna switch from 8 bits per channel 我们要从每通道8位切换到 like we have with our JPEG images over to 32 bits 就像我们在JPEG图像中使用的那样，切换到32位 per channel 每通道 which will give us a lot more data 这将为我们提供更多的数据 to work with inside of our viewport 在我们的视口内操作的数据 let's just import our image sequence 让我们导入图像序列 So I'm just gonna select the JPEG sequence 所以我只是选择JPEG序列 that we have here and press Import 我们这里有的，并点击导入 And we can see it imported incorrectly 我们可以看到它导入不正确 You can see the frame rate is actually set to 30 你可以看到帧速率实际上被设为30 when it should be 24. 而应该是24 So to change properties like this 要更改这样的属性 just go to Interpret Footage and Main 只需转到“解释镜头”和“主要” And from here we can set our frame rate 从这里我们可以设置帧速率 to 24 frames per second 设为每秒24帧 Then just click on the Color tab at the top 然后只需点击顶部的“颜色”选项卡 and we're gonna change our color space over to Output sRGB 我们将把我们的颜色空间更改为输出sRGB So don't be intimidated when there's this huge list here 所以，当有这么长的列表时，不要感到害怕 We just need to remember the few that we're gonna use 我们只需记住我们要使用的几个。 over and over again 一遍又一遍地重复。 And one of those common ones is gonna be Output sRGB 其中一个常见的选项将是输出 sRGB。 And let's press OK 然后，点击“确定”。 And then from here 然后，从这里开始。 we can click our image sequence 我们可以点击我们的图像序列。 and drag it over this Composition button 然后拖动到这个合成按钮上。 to create a new composition using the settings 以使用这些设置创建一个新的合成。 from our footage 从我们的素材中。 And you can see here 你可以在这里看到。 we have an exact match 我们有一个完全匹配。 with our Nuke viewport and the viewport inside of Unreal 与我们的 Nuke 视口和 Unreal 内部的视口完全匹配。 And now if we apply a Levels so that we can adjust 现在，如果我们应用一些级别，以便进行调整。 the brightness of our image here 这里我们可以调整图像的亮度。 if I change the Output White Point and bring this lower 如果我更改输出的白平衡点并将其降低。 to reduce the brightness 以降低亮度。 you can see that we have 你可以看到我们有。 all of that same range that we had inside of Nuke 我们在 Nuke 中有的所有范围。 and we get that same behavior where this is reacting 我们得到相同的行为，就像这个是在反应。 just like a raw photograph 就像一张原始照片一样。 Now if you go to the Window tab and press Info 现在，如果你转到“窗口”选项卡并按下“信息”。 here you can actually see the RGB data 在这里，你实际上可以看到 RGB 数据。 of each individual pixel 每个单独像素的数据。 So if I reset the levels to see what it looks like 因此，如果我重置级别来查看它的样子。 by default 默认情况下。 we can see here that our pixels 我们可以看到这里的像素。 are actually brighter than a value of one 实际上比一个值更亮。 We have much more dynamic range in our image 我们的图像具有更大的动态范围。 and we can quickly preview brighter or lower exposures 我们可以快速预览更亮或更低的曝光。 by dragging left and right with our viewport exposure here 通过在这里拖动左右以调整视口曝光。 And then to add Film Grain 然后添加胶片颗粒。 all you need to do 你需要做的就是。 is create a new solid layer and just make sure 创建一个新的实体层，确保。 that it's set to 50% gray 它设置为50%的灰度。 And then we can add Grain onto this layer 然后我们可以在这一层上添加颗粒 change the Viewing Mode over to Final Output 将查看模式切换到最终输出 and that'll apply
